creator: Woodruff@RadOnc17.UCSF.Edu
text:
RO-MZ-Ph03# pwd
/usr/ports/misc/zoneinfo
RO-MZ-Ph03# make
Makefile error: you need to define PORTNAME and PORTVERSION instead of PKGNAME.
(This port is too old for your bsd.port.mk, please update it to match
 your bsd.port.mk.)
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/misc/zoneinfo.

How-To-Repeat: as above 

As a working sysadmin with 7 production FreeBSD systems, and a raft of others, 
I really do not know how to keep up with the very latest in all of the ports, nor 
have the time.  Is there a reasonably quick fix to this, or should I just plan to 
manually hack the time for the three weeks in spring and one week in fall.
